en: happening inside of her brain.
Ooh, maybe I should drive her
ko: 오, 그녀를 내 전 남자친구의 품으로

en: into the arms of my ex-boyfriend. That sounds fun.
What do I do about John the Gossip King
or the demon spy who punched me in the face?
And how do I do it all with a pleasant smile
ko: 그리고 모두의 기분을 좋게 하기 위해

en: to keep everyone's spirits up?
ko: 어떻게 미소를 지으며 이 모든 걸 해야 하지?

en: I'm not meant for this.
I'm not the freaking savior of the universe.
I'm just a girl from Arizona.
That's it.
I'm just a normal girl from Arizona. I ate junk food.
ko: 나는 애리조나의 평범한 소녀야. 정크푸드를 먹었어.

en: I watched reality shows.
I sometimes left H&M wearing more underpants
than I had on when I came in.
I did a bad job of being in charge of my own life, and now I'm supposed to be in charge of everyone else's life?
ko: 내 인생을 잘 관리하지도 못했는데, 이제 다른 사람들의 인생을 관리해야 한다고?

en: I cannot do this.
When I started my experiment,
I thought four broken bird brains
ko: 나는 네 개의 부서진 새의 뇌를 생각했어.
